item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-06 - Today's Summary
item.description: Coding agent / SWE agent category shows the strongest momentum today, with an average daily delta of 2,010 stars across 4 repos, led by github/copilot-sdk (462 stars/day). The MCP / Tool Calling category also remains hot with a single repo averaging 2,762 stars/day. Hacker News adds cross-source confirmation: a post titled 'Did Claude increase bugs in rsync?' (345 votes) signals developer curiosity about AI code quality, aligning with the coding agent trend. Meanwhile, AI Agent Framework category cools slightly (avg 745 stars/day) after recent peaks. The sustained attention on NVIDIA/cosmos (682 stars/day) suggests continued interest in world models for physical AI, though it remains a smaller category. The sudden breakout of stas00/ml-engineering (2.5x acceleration) may indicate growing interest in practical ML training guides, but its category (RAG) seems misclassified and warrants watching. Top projects: mvanhorn/last30days-skill, github/copilot-sdk, lfnovo/open-notebook, NVIDIA/cosmos, stas00/ml-engineering, esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix, chopratejas/headroom, CopilotKit/CopilotKit, affaan-m/ECC, nexu-io/open-design, rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch, HKUDS/nanobot Note: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。 Note: daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。 Note: Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。 Note: Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。

item.title: [sustained_hot] mvanhorn/last30days-skill (+1008 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: An AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web, then synthesizes a grounded summary. Why it matters: With 28,083 stars, 2,386 forks, and a 24-hour delta of +814 stars, this project is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The recent v3 release and active commits (within 7 days) keep the momentum fresh. Developer insight: The project signals a shift toward agent-based research that bypasses traditional search engines. For AI developers, it shows the value of bridging walled-garden platforms and using engagement signals (upvotes, likes, market odds) as ranking signals. The modular skill architecture (via Agent Skills) is a pattern worth adopting. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] github/copilot-sdk (+462 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Multi-language SDK to embed GitHub Copilot's agent runtime into any application via JSON-RPC. Why it matters: The repo has 9,280 stars and gained 462 stars in the last 24 hours, with a sustained_hot trend and low acceleration (1.0). This indicates steady, organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The recent release and active commits suggest ongoing improvements, making it a reliable choice for developers looking to embed Copilot agents today. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward agent-as-a-service: instead of building your own agent orchestration, you can rely on Copilot's battle-tested runtime. The multi-language support and BYOK option lower adoption barriers for enterprises. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] lfnovo/open-notebook (+1682 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Open-source, self-hosted alternative to Google Notebook LM with multi-model AI support, podcast generation, and privacy-first design. Why it matters: The project has 25,724 stars and gained 1,304 stars in the last 24 hours, indicating strong and sustained attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), suggesting steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. This consistent velocity makes it a reliable project to watch for developers interested in AI-powered note-taking and research tools. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward decentralized AI applications where users demand control over data and model selection. The multi-provider approach reduces dependency on single vendors and aligns with the growing 'local-first' AI movement. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] NVIDIA/cosmos (+682 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: World Models / Physical AI / Multimodal Foundation Models Description: NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools for building Physical AI in robotics, autonomous vehicles, and smart infrastructure. Why it matters: With 9,457 stars and a 24-hour delta of +682, Cosmos is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is low (1), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The recent release of Cosmos 3 (within 30 days) and active commits within 7 days keep the project top-of-mind for the AI community. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward unified multimodal models for Physical AI, reducing the need to combine separate vision, language, and action models. Developers should evaluate Cosmos for tasks like synthetic data generation, policy learning, and world simulation. Risk: Low
item.category: World Models / Physical AI / Multimodal Foundation Models

item.title: [sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+18 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: A comprehensive open book of methodologies, tools, and commands for training and fine-tuning large language and multi-modal models. Why it matters: With 18,015 stars and a sudden acceleration ratio of 2.9 (high), the repo is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour star delta of 20 and 7-day average of 6 indicate a sharp increase in attention, likely driven by the growing need for hands-on ML engineering guidance as LLM training becomes more accessible. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward open, community-driven knowledge sharing in ML engineering, reducing the barrier for smaller teams to adopt large-scale training practices. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix (+1179 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go for prefix-cache stability and low token costs. Why it matters: With 18,553 stars and a 7-day average delta of 875.8 stars/day, this project is experiencing sustained high growth. The 24-hour delta of 1,179 stars and acceleration of 1.3 indicate continued strong momentum, likely driven by the recent 1.0 Go rewrite and active community engagement. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward specialized, model-native agents that optimize for cost and performance. The plugin architecture and sandboxed permissions model set a new standard for safe, extensible AI tooling. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] chopratejas/headroom (+5021 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Headroom compresses tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks by 60–95% before they reach an LLM, preserving answer quality while drastically cutting token usage. Why it matters: Headroom has exploded from 0 to 14,663 stars, with a 24-hour delta of 5,021 stars and a 3-day average of 3,316 stars per day. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady, sustained growth rather than a sudden spike. This is a project that has captured massive developer attention in a very short time, likely due to the pressing need for token optimization in the age of AI agents. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward treating token compression as a standard layer in AI infrastructure, similar to how caching or load balancing became essential in web services. Developers should consider integrating compression early in their stack to optimize costs and context usage. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] CopilotKit/CopilotKit (+840 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: CopilotKit is a multi-platform SDK for building agent-native applications with Generative UI, shared state, and human-in-the-loop workflows across React, Angular, Vue, React Native, Slack, and Teams. Why it matters: CopilotKit is experiencing a sudden breakout with 840 stars in the last 24 hours and a 7-day average of 20 stars/day, now accelerating to 33.2 (high acceleration ratio). With 32,770 total stars and 4,201 forks, it has crossed into mainstream attention. The project's recent release and active commits (within 7 days) suggest a product launch or major feature announcement is driving this spike. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward agent-native frontends as a standard architectural pattern, similar to how React became the default for web UIs. Developers should evaluate CopilotKit as the frontend layer for their agent stacks to avoid reinventing the wheel. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] affaan-m/ECC (+2762 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: A harness-native operator system that optimizes AI agent performance across multiple coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) with skills, memory, security, and continuous learning. Why it matters: With 208K+ stars, a 24-hour star delta of 2,762, and a 7-day average of 1,647, this project is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.3 indicates steady momentum rather than a sudden spike, suggesting deep community adoption. The recent v2.0.0-rc.1 release (Apr 2026) adds operator workflows, a dashboard GUI, and Rust control-plane alpha, signaling active development and expanding scope. Developer insight: The rise of ECC signals a shift toward platform-level tooling for AI agents. Developers are moving beyond single-harness configs to cross-harness systems that manage skills, memory, and security centrally. This trend suggests that the next wave of AI developer tools will focus on orchestration and optimization rather than just agent capabilities. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+1376 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Open Design is a local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design that turns your coding agent into a design engine, generating prototypes, decks, images, and videos from a single design system. Why it matters: With 59,513 stars and a 7-day average delta of 639.6 stars/day, Open Design is experiencing sustained high growth. The 24-hour delta of 1,376 and acceleration ratio of 1.9 (just below the sudden breakout threshold) indicate strong, consistent attention momentum. The project has a recent release (0.9.0) and active commits within 7 days, signaling ongoing development and community engagement. Developer insight: This signals a shift from GUI-based design to code-driven, agent-orchestrated design. For AI developers, it means building tools that treat design systems as code (DESIGN.md) and output as artifacts (HTML/PDF/PPTX) — a pattern that could become standard for agent-generated content. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch (+983 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +983，总 stars 28,876，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] HKUDS/nanobot (+147 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Lightweight, open-source AI agent for your tools, chats, and workflows. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +147，前 3 日均值 65.3，加速度 2.3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
